log: Sef Adeyemi counts their pay twice on payday and sends most of it somewhere they don't name.
You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.
◇ THE BROADCAST — every radio in the sector played the same four seconds. The band has holes in it now.
Dane Okoro folds the Union news feed away half-read, jaw tight, and finds something to polish.
